policy_statement: Retrofit buildings to reduce energy use and GHG emissions across residential, multifamily, industrial, City/sister-agency, and commercial buildings.
verbatim_text:
S T R A T E G Y   1

RETROFIT BUILDINGS

Chicago's residential, commercial, and industrial buildings account for nearly 69% of the City's carbon footprint. Reducing building energy use through efficiency will reduce the city's GHG emissions, save residents and businesses money, and improve the city's resiliency to climate shocks and stressors.
section_header: S T R A T E G Y 1 | RETROFIT BUILDINGS
extraction_rationale: Named strategy with multiple lettered, quantified actions beneath it; functions as an umbrella program.

policy_statement: Retrofit residential buildings with 4 or fewer units: 20% by 2030 and 50% by 2040, prioritizing low- or moderate-income households.
verbatim_text: Retrofit residential buildings with 4 or fewer units: 20% by 2030 and 50% by 2040, prioritizing low- or moderate-income households
section_header: S T R A T E G Y 1 | RETROFIT BUILDINGS
extraction_rationale: Lettered action (A) with quantified targets and timelines under a named Strategy.

policy_statement: Retrofit 20% of total 5+ unit residential buildings by 2030.
verbatim_text: Retrofit 20% of total 5+ unit residential buildings by 2030
section_header: S T R A T E G Y 1 | RETROFIT BUILDINGS
extraction_rationale: Lettered action (B) with a quantified target and deadline under a named Strategy.

policy_statement: Retrofit 20% of total industrial buildings by 2030.
verbatim_text: Retrofit 20% of total industrial buildings by 2030
section_header: S T R A T E G Y 1 | RETROFIT BUILDINGS
extraction_rationale: Lettered action (C) with quantified target and deadline under a named Strategy.

policy_statement: Retrofit 90% of total city-owned and sister agency-owned buildings by 2035.
verbatim_text: Retrofit 90% of total city-owned and sister agency-owned buildings by 2035
section_header: S T R A T E G Y 1 | RETROFIT BUILDINGS
extraction_rationale: Lettered action (D) with quantified target and deadline under a named Strategy.

verbatim_text: Retrofit 20% of total commercial buildings by 2035
section_header: S T R A T E G Y 1 | RETROFIT BUILDINGS
extraction_rationale: Lettered action (E) with quantified target and deadline under a named Strategy.

policy_statement: Connect communities to renewable energy through community ownership models and expanded renewable generation access.
verbatim_text:
S T R A T E G Y   2

CONNECT COMMUNITIES TO RENEWABLE ENERGY

Expanding innovative community ownership models for renewable energy projects on City property and utilizing state funding will help Chicago achieve 100% clean renewable energy community-wide by 2035.
section_header: S T R A T E G Y 2 | CONNECT COMMUNITIES TO RENEWABLE ENERGY
extraction_rationale: Named strategy with lettered actions and targets beneath it; umbrella for multiple commitments.

verbatim_text: Increase Chicago-based community renewables to 20 megawatts by 2025

extraction_rationale: Lettered action (B) with quantified capacity target and deadline.

policy_statement: Reduce waste and landfilling through organic waste collection, source prevention, and diversion targets across waste streams.
verbatim_text:
S T R A T E G Y   1

REDUCE WASTE AND LANDFILLING

Acknowledging that reducing overall waste provides the greatest benefits, it is also important to improve the convenience and effectiveness of waste management infrastructure, so that it is easier for individuals and businesses to divert waste from landfills.

policy_statement: Invest $188 million (Chicago Recovery Plan) in climate resiliency and mitigation interventions, including building retrofits, air quality monitoring expansion, and planting over 75,000 trees.
